quality_checks.R1_note: 所有字段类型正确, pre_build.actions[] 包含 key/name/start/end/duration_seconds/evidence
quality_checks.R3_note: 所有 duration_seconds >= 0, shell镜像缓存命中记为 0.0
quality_checks.R4_note: pre_build actions 总和 88.63s (部分重叠), total_seconds=102.227s 从边界计算 (20:02:06.971 -> 20:03:49.198); build_phases=8.164s; unattributed=5.696s 含post-build user_properties和JobStatusPlugin收尾
quality_checks.R5_note: 所有 action 包含 evidence 字段, 引用日志原文关键行和时间戳
quality_checks.R6_note: orchestrator='docker' 与日志中无 Volcano/k8s 调度痕迹、直接 docker pull + 容器内执行模式一致
quality_checks.R7_note: key_bottleneck='docker_pull' (43.76s / 42.8% of pre_build), 证据: 16层镜像完整下载 (非缓存命中), 逐层 Pull complete 从 20:02:38 到 20:03:16
quality_checks.R8_note: unattributed_seconds=5.696 (非负), 包含 post-build: user_properties步骤 (20:03:57.404~20:03:57.443, 0.04s)、JobStatusPlugin onCompleted (20:03:58.832)、frame slave-type (20:04:02.887)、Finished: SUCCESS (20:04:03.058), 以及日志采样中 ~4s 的pip下载间隙 (20:03:28 -> 20:03:40 pyproject_hooks下载)
quality_checks.R9_note: pre_build=88.1%, build=7.0%, unattributed=4.9%; Docker原生模式, 无Pod调度开销, 但Build容器镜像拉取(43.76s) 和 pip工具链安装(22.92s) 是两大耗时来源; 构建本身仅8.2s (纯Python wheel)
